MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON APR-29-2021 IN 206, DEFENDANT WALSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY II AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S JOINT MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. MICHAEL WALKER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT WALSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY II. DEVIN COURTEAU, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOTION WHICH IS IN VIOLATION OF SF LOCAL RULE 2.7B. THE COURT ORDERS MR. COURTEAU TO PAY $60.00 FILING FEE NO LATER THAN 4:30PM TODAY FOR THE CONTINUANCE WHICH IS THE COST OF FILING PAPERS THAT DEFENDANT WOULD HAVE TO FILE AGAIN WITH A COURTESY COPY IN ORDER TO GET THE NEW TRIAL DATE. THE COURT GRANTS DEFENDANTS WALSH CONSTRUCTION COMPANY II, LLC AND THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S JOINT MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE OF 6/21/21 IS VACATED AND THE NEW TRIAL DATE IS 1/24/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES, DISCOVERY AND MOTION PRACTICE INCLUDING 2034 CCP EXPERT DISCOVERY SHALL BE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. MR. COURTEAU TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER THAT IS APPROVED AS TO FORM AND SEND NOTICE OF TRIAL TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
